pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh explicitly set the target directory.
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly specify the target OpenToonz scene filename.
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly specify the target text report filename.
Task description explicitly states 1280x720 resolution, checked by verifier.py.
Task description explicitly states 1280x720 resolution, checked by verifier.py.
Task description explicitly requires 24 fps frame rate, checked by verifier.py.
Task description explicitly requires 120 frames scene length, checked by verifier.py.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an OpenToonz scene file (ep01_sc010.tnz) and a specifications report (scene_specs.txt) in the /home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/ep01_sc010 directory. The scene must be configured with a resolution of 1280x720, a frame rate of 24 fps, and a scene length of 120 frames.
